title: Lightweight Music Player
summary: Self-contained player with controls and the built-in variant switcher.

title: Variant A · Cinematic Cover
summary: Cover-first layout with a larger hero area and simpler primary controls.

title: Variant B · Studio Rack
summary: Console-like layout with denser controls and a studio-inspired composition.

title: Variant C · Timeline Queue
summary: Queue-first layout focused on browsing tracks before starting playback.
